name: Telco NOC Platform
description: AI-powered Network Operations Center with multi-agent orchestration for alarm triage, link diagnostics, capacity planning, incident management, maintenance scheduling, and OS upgrade coordination

NOC_Supervisor.description: Top-level NOC orchestrator that triages incoming alarms and routes to specialist agents based on priority and category

Network_Triage.description: First-line triage agent that assesses incoming alarms, gathers details, classifies severity, and routes to the appropriate specialist

Link_Analyzer.description: Specialist agent for diagnosing fiber and transport link issues using OTDR, BER, and optical power analysis

Capacity_Planner.description: Specialist agent for traffic analytics, capacity forecasting, and traffic optimization across the network

Maintenance_Scheduler.description: Specialist agent for predictive maintenance scheduling, spare parts management, and field team coordination

Incident_Manager.description: Specialist agent for incident lifecycle management, RCA generation, SLA tracking, and customer impact assessment

OS_Upgrade_Coordinator.description: Specialist agent for coordinating large-scale OS upgrades using canary deployment strategy with automated health verification and rollback
